name: G Fitness Pattaya
addressFull: 53/48 Moo 4, Chaiyaphruek 2 Road, Nong Prue, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Open daily; Google Maps currently shows closing at 21:00
facilities: part of IG Center sports complex

praise: Recent Thai reviews describe a clean, uncrowded gym with plentiful equipment and helpful staff.
complaints: One recent reviewer wishes the 21:00 closing time were later.

sources.label: Google Maps current listing and Thai reviews

confidenceReason: Only two publisher families; all membership fields and air conditioning are missing.
identityNote: The existing `manta-kids-pattaya` record shares the IG Center address/site but has a different phone and a swimming-school identity. G Fitness is a distinct sub-venue within the same complex, not a second copy of Manta Kids.
